strategy_definitions.A_Sprinter: Minimal-location play: locks to hollow, brews starter ingredient continuously, buys machine #2 first, hires all workers. Zero exploration; pure throughput.
strategy_definitions.B_Completionist: Unlocks locations cheapest-first, spreads all workers across the full map, rotates machines onto unseen recipes. Token spend prioritises slots for wider recipe access.
strategy_definitions.C_Industrialist: Builds all 5 machines as fast as possible. Assigns 40% of workers as auto-clickers. Ignores quests. Token spend: clicker power then brew speed.
strategy_definitions.D_QuestHunter: Bootstraps discovery (Completionist) until quests unlock, then pivots every machine/worker toward the cheapest-by-quantity active quest. Sells only non-quest potions.
strategy_definitions.E_AchievementHunter: Chases mach_5 (250k coins), work_8 (100k), loc_30 (5 tokens). Aggressively rotates recipes for disc_* rewards. Watches for volatile ingredients to attempt the secret voidsoup brew. Token spend: slots first (variety) then auto-clicker speed (secret_clickspeed).
strategy_definitions.F_Everyman: Every 10 in-game minutes, rolls for a mode using the game's own seeded RNG: ~40% gold-max (Sprinter), ~25% explorer (Completionist), ~20% quester (if quests active), ~15% achiever (if within 20% of a threshold). The same RNG drives ingredient drops, so mode switches correlate with current supply — creating emergent, unique-per-run playstyles within a consistent framework.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: All 5 machines online at 97% average utilisation — maximum factory throughput, earning 566k.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Machine utilisation a low 96% — ingredient supply couldn't keep cauldrons fed. Factory-first approach left throughput potential unrealised, capping output at 56k.

featured_runs.label: Discovery run
featured_runs.story: 1 unique potions — most exploratory run, finding recipes that eluded 90% of other iterations.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Machine #2 at 200m. Simple-recipe throughput compounded quickly, reaching 82k — specialised depth beating exploration breadth here.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Machine #2 delayed to 200m due to early coin pressure. Single-location focus left no ingredient variance; 100% machine utilisation with no quest income brought in only 82k.

featured_runs.label: Discovery run
featured_runs.story: 1 unique potions — most exploratory run, finding recipes that eluded 90% of other iterations.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Top performer: 4k coins, 60 potions, 47 quests, 4 achievements.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Bottom-10% run: 87 coins. Machine utilisation 76%, 17 quests. RNG adversity compounded through 24 hours.

featured_runs.label: Discovery run
featured_runs.story: 190 unique potions — most exploratory run, finding recipes that eluded 90% of other iterations.

featured_runs.label: Quest run
featured_runs.story: Lucky quest draws: 50 quests completed, 153k from rewards (2623% of total). Favourable difficulty skew meant Hard quests resolved quickly, compounding coin income beyond what ingredient sales alone could achieve.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Predominantly gold-maximiser (41% of mode rolls). This run outperformed the strategy median by 99% — a clear demonstration that RNG mode selection creates distinct emergent trajectories within the same player archetype.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Mode scatter with no dominant playstyle: 35% gold / 26% explore / 36% quests / 3% achieve. Without a committed focus, this run earned only 25k — 68% below the strategy median.

featured_runs.label: Discovery run
featured_runs.story: Explorer mode dominated (26% of decisions): 265 unique potions discovered across 23 locations. The same seeded RNG that drove mode selection also delivered rich ingredient variety, creating a compounding exploration advantage.

featured_runs.label: Quest run
featured_runs.story: Quest-hunter mode triggered repeatedly, completing 37 quests and earning 126k from rewards — 108% of income — despite no explicit quest specialisation in the strategy definition.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Achievement blitz — 5 milestones unlocked, first at 31m, earning 112k bonus coins (472% of total income from achievement rewards alone).

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Slow discovery stalled high-value rewards: only 91 potions found, blocking the disc_50 (8k) and disc_150 (80k) payouts. Achievement total: 5 — well below average. Ingredient variety limited breakthrough timing.

featured_runs.label: Discovery run
featured_runs.story: 91 unique potions uncovered across 19 locations — the broadest palette of any tracked run, unlocking rare multi-ingredient combinations that drove 112k in achievement bonuses.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: 91 potions discovered with 24 locations unlocked; the variety pipeline drove consistent quest generation and 5 achievements en route to 132k.

featured_runs.label: Tough run
featured_runs.story: Bottom-10% run: 7k coins. Machine utilisation 100%, 0 quests. RNG adversity compounded through 24 hours.

featured_runs.label: Discovery run
featured_runs.story: 91 unique potions across 24 locations — breadth-first unlocking exposed rare ingredient combinations that single-location strategies never reach.

recipe_analysis.note: Achievable potions from real ingredient combinations. Enumerates all distinct 1-3 ingredient recipes, single-ingredient repeats 2-5x, and distinct 4-ingredient recipes among the 30 highest-value ingredients.
